snippet: Assessment is an ongoing process of gathering, analysing and interpreting evidence of student achievement and progress, and reflecting on findings. Effective teachers use student assessment results to evaluate the impact of their teaching on student learning, and then adapt their practices to better meet the needs of all students. Quality assessment forms a foundation upon which: against curriculum standards can be made, which are critical to understanding how well each student is developing as a successful learner, individual and citizen. Any account of a student’s learning and development needs to be robust and comprehensive, drawing on multiple sources of data and evidence.
